summary: Avoid parallel ABH write commands against the same object
context: During plan-019 dogfooding, plan transition and plan update were launched in parallel against plan-019. Both commands rewrote the same plan JSON/Markdown files without locking, leaving duplicated trailing fragments and causing JSONDecodeError: Extra data when reading the plan.
implication: Until ABH writes are atomic or locked, dogfooding agents should run ABH write commands sequentially for the same object. A future hardening plan should add atomic write or file-lock protection around write_json and Markdown render writes.
deprecation_policy: Mark deprecated when evidence no longer applies.
